description: The FeedOrderedItemInterface component is used as a template type item in data feed mappers in the Data Feeds system. This acts as an item in a list of items that can be reordered and moved around.

fields.Value: The value field of this ordered item. Can write to the original feed valuem
fields.Formatting: How to format the value when it is displayed in text.
fields.IsFirst: The field to set to whether this item is currently first
fields.IsLast: The field to set to whether this item is currently last.
fields.MoveUpLabel: The field that represents this item's move up label.
fields.MoveDownLabel: The field that represents this item's move down label.
fields.MakeFirstLabel: The field that represents this item's make first label.
fields.MakeLastLabel: The field that represents this item's make last label.
fields.MoveUp: This field is populated with the Action that can be called to move the item up.
fields.MoveDown: This field is populated with the Action that can be called to move the item down.
fields.MakeFirst: This field is populated with the Action that can be called to make the item first.
fields.MakeLast: This field is populated with the Action that can be called to make the item last.
fields.HasMoveUp: The field to set to whether this item can currently be moved further up.
fields.HasMoveDown: The field to set to whether this item can currently be moved down.
fields.HasMakeFirst: The field to set to whether this item can currently be made first.
fields.HasMakeLast: The field to set to whether this item can currently be made last.
